theme_strategy.rationale: Indian GenZ demographic associates dark mode with premium, elite, and modern experiences (similar to CRED, FamPay). High contrast neon accents provide the requested 'playful' and 'finance-focused' feel without being 'corporate-boring'.

headings.usage: Use for all screen titles, large numbers (balance, expenses), and prominent UI headers. Must use tracking-tighter for a modern look.

body.usage: Use for transaction lists, subtitles, AI chat text, and forms.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) on the main background to break the digital flatness.

icons.style: Stroke width 2.5 for better visibility and playful boldness. Use rounded edges.

general.safe_area: Ensure SafeAreaView is used to prevent notch collisions.

dashboard.structure: Vertical stack on mobile. Web uses a Bento grid (md:grid-cols-12).
dashboard.cards: Monthly spending as hero card (col-span-12). AI insight card below (col-span-12 md:col-span-6).

bottom_nav.style: Floating glassmorphism pill. Positioned absolute at bottom, left 6, right 6. Contains 4-5 evenly spaced icons. Active icon has a primary color dot or background glow.

analytics_heatmap.style: GitHub-style contribution graph but for expenses. Colors range from empty (surface-elevated) to intense danger (#F43F5E) for high spend days.

buttons.primary: bg-[#EC4899] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(236,72,153,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2D3748] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center
buttons.outline: border-2 border-white/10 text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0B10] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-white font-medium focus:border-[#EC4899]
inputs.numpad: Grid of large touchable text components for quick expense entry. No standard OS keyboard for numbers.

tags_chips.style: bg-[#2D3748] rounded-full px-4 py-2 flex-row items-center gap-2

ai_chat_bubble.user: bg-[#2D3748] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 self-end
ai_chat_bubble.bot: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#8B5CF6]/10 to-[#EC4899]/10 border border-[#8B5CF6]/30 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 self-start

motion.transitions: Use react-native-reanimated for fluid, spring-based animations. Avoid linear easings.
motion.interactions: Buttons scale down to 0.95 on press. Cards slightly translate up on web hover.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in and slide-up for list items (transactions).

landing_hero.description: Person holding smartphone with financial analytics, used for web landing page hero section.

ai_background.description: Colorful abstract 3D shapes. Use as a heavily blurred background overlay (opacity 10-15%) for the AI Chatbot screen.

avatars.description: Young person smiling. Use for 'Shared Budgets' member avatars (crop to circle).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast against #171923 and #0A0B10.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements (chips, icons, buttons).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: NEVER use generic centered layouts or simplistic flat gradients. Create depth using borders, shadows, and glassmorphism.
ALWAYS use the defined color tokens. Do not invent new shades of gray or primary colors.
For Expo (React Native), use NativeWind or standard StyleSheet mapping the Tailwind tokens.
DO NOT apply global transitions like 'transition: all' in web CSS.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on every button, list item, and form input.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for headers/dropdowns over content. Use glassmorphism.
Avoid using purely decorative emojis. Use Lucide icons instead.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a high-fidelity, GenZ-focused mobile experience. The Dashboard must feel like a command center (dark, glowing accents, clear hierarchy). The Add Expense flow must be hyper-fast (custom numpad, large category chips). The AI chatbot should feel distinct with a subtle purple/pink glow. Ensure the web preview matches the mobile layout elegantly, centering a phone-sized container or using a responsive Bento grid.
